Bash(cd "D:\\ai\\wf_bank_test" && python << 'PYTHON'
import json
import os
import sys

# 设置输出编码
if sys.platform == 'win32':
    import codecs
    sys.stdout = codecs.getwriter\('utf-8'\)\(sys.stdout.buffer, 'strict'\)

print\("Name Consistency Check\\n"\)

# 读取 marketplace.json
with open\('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    marketplace = json.load\(f\)

print\(f"{'Marketplace':<25} {'Plugin.json':<25} {'Directory':<25} {'Skill subdir':<25} {'Status'}"\)
print\("=" * 110\)

for plugin_config in marketplace['plugins']:
    mp_name = plugin_config['name']
    source = plugin_config['source'].replace\('./plugins/', ''\)
    
    # 读取 plugin.json
    plugin_json_path = f'plugins/{source}/.claude-plugin/plugin.json'
    with open\(plugin_json_path, encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        plugin_data = json.load\(f\)
        pj_name = plugin_data['name']
    
    # 获取 skills 子目录
    skills_dir = f'plugins/{source}/skills'
    skill_subdirs = os.listdir\(skills_dir\) if os.path.exists\(skills_dir\) else []
    skill_name = skill_subdirs[0] if skill_subdirs else 'N/A'
    
    # 判断是否一致
    all_same = \(mp_name == pj_name == source == skill_name\)
    status = "OK" if all_same else "MISMATCH"
    
    print\(f"{mp_name:<25} {pj_name:<24} {source:<24} {skill_name:<24} {status}"\)

PYTHON)
